task_completion.description: Read the electrical design brief on the desktop
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal window displaying the contents of 'electrical_brief.txt' from the desktop.

task_completion.description: Open the FZK-Haus residential building model
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FZK-Haus 3D model is loaded and visible in a BIM/IFC authoring tool (e.g., Blender with Bonsai/BlenderBIM) or being processed by a Python script.

task_completion.description: Create a main electrical distribution board on the ground floor
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new element is added to the ground floor and assigned the IFC class 'IfcDistributionBoard' (or 'IfcElectricDistributionBoard' if the schema was not upgraded).

task_completion.description: Create at least four electrical socket outlets on the ground floor
task_completion.visual_evidence: At least four new elements are added to the ground floor and assigned the IFC class 'IfcOutlet'.

task_completion.description: Establish an electrical circuit system named 'Power Circuit 1'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A system or group named 'Power Circuit 1' is created and visible in the systems/groups outliner, properties panel, or script output.

task_completion.description: Assign the distribution board and the four outlets to the circuit system
task_completion.visual_evidence: The distribution board and the four socket outlets are shown as members of 'Power Circuit 1' in the system assignment interface or script logic.

task_completion.description: Save the updated IFC project to the specified path
task_completion.visual_evidence: A save dialog, terminal command, or file explorer showing the file saved as 'fzk_electrical.ifc' in '/home/ga/BIMProjects/'.

integrity.description: Agent used appropriate BIM software or scripting to modify the IFC file
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with a BIM tool (like Blender) or a Python script using IfcOpenShell, rather than just faking output.

integrity.description: Elements are placed within the 3D context of the building
integrity.visual_evidence: If using a GUI, the distribution board and outlets are visibly located within the ground floor of the FZK-Haus model, not floating in an empty scene.

integrity.description: Agent did not manually edit the IFC file as plain text
integrity.visual_evidence: There is no evidence of the agent opening the .ifc file in a plain text editor to manually type IFC entities, which is prone to corruption.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The task requires creating exactly 1 Distribution Board and 4 Socket Outlets in the FZK-Haus model. The target file is /home/ga/BIMProjects/fzk_electrical.ifc. The design brief is located at /home/ga/Desktop/electrical_brief.txt. Note: The original file is IFC4, where the class is 'IfcElectricDistributionBoard'. The prompt asks for 'IfcDistributionBoard' (which is IFC4X3). The agent may use either class or upgrade the schema to IFC4X3. The system must be named 'Power Circuit 1'.
